channel.title: Tesla Shorts Time Daily
channel.description: Daily Tesla news digest and podcast hosted by Patrick in Vancouver. Covering the latest Tesla developments, stock updates, and short squeeze celebrations.
channel.itunes:author: Patrick
channel.itunes:summary: Daily Tesla news digest and podcast covering the latest developments, stock updates, and short squeeze celebrations.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time Daily - Episode 337 - December 01, 2025 at 03:05 AM PST
item.description: Daily Tesla news digest for December 01, 2025 at 03:05 AM PST. TSLA price: $430.17 +3.59 (+0.84%) . 1️⃣ **Tesla’s new Holiday perk is timed perfectly to make FSD a household name: 30 November, 2025, 11:57 PM PST, Teslarati**...
item.itunes:summary: Daily Tesla news digest for December 01, 2025 at 03:05 AM PST. TSLA price: $430.17 +3.59 (+0.84%) . 1️⃣ **Tesla’s new Holiday perk is timed perfectly to make FSD a household name: 30 November, 2025, 11:57 PM PST, Teslarati**...
item.itunes:title: Tesla Shorts Time Daily - Episode 337 - December 01, 2025 at 03:05 AM PST

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time Daily - Episode 336 - November 30, 2025
item.description: 🚗⚡ **Tesla Shorts Time** - DAILY EDITION 📅 **Date:** November 30, 2025 at 03:04 AM PST 💰 **REAL-TIME TSLA price:** $430.17 +3.59 (+0.84%) ... 🎙️ Tesla Shorts Time Daily Podcast Link: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/tesla-shorts-time/id1855142939
